message:
refactor: formatting and style cleanups across multiple modules

Apply formatting and minor refactoring improvements across several
modules:

- cancel/symbol_cancel.rs: reformat match arms and method signatures
  for consistency
- error.rs: minor adjustment to error variant ordering
- migration/mod.rs: simplify match expressions and reduce nesting
- raptorq/pipeline.rs: reformat chained method calls and adjust
  line wrapping
- record/symbol_obligation_tracker.rs: clean up method signatures
- record/symbolic_obligation.rs: reformat builder patterns and
  reduce line-length violations
- runtime/builder.rs: add missing import
- types/builder.rs: add missing import
- web/extract.rs: simplify error mapping closures
- web/router.rs: adjust route registration formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
